action.description: Passed Third Reading with Representative(s) Alcos, Amato, Garcia, Gedeon, Matsumoto, Muraoka, Reyes Oda, Shimizu voting aye with reservations; Representative(s) Cochran, Grandinetti, Hartsfield, Hussey, Iwamoto, Poepoe, Souza voting no (7) and Representative(s) Perruso, Quinlan, Sayama excused (3).  Transmitted to Senate.
